headline: Supermicro CEO insists ‘no one’ beyond indicted employees were involved in alleged $2.5 billion smuggling scheme
summary: CEO and Chairman Charles Liang said Supermicro’s relationship with vendors including Nvidia, AMD, Intel, and Broadcom was “strong” despite the accusations against a Supermicro cofounder. Supermicro stock rose 17% in after-hours trading.

headline: Super Micro (SMCI) shares surge after strong fourth-quarter sales outlook
summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) jumped more than 19% in premarket trading on Wednesday after the server maker issued a fourth-quarter revenue forecast that exceeded Wall Street expectations, supported by continued strong demand for AI-focused data center infrastructure. By 04:12 ET, shares in the company had rallied sharply following the release of its latest quarterly results and outlook.

content.title: Super Micro (SMCI) shares surge after strong fourth-quarter sales outlook
content.summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) jumped more than 19% in premarket trading on Wednesday after the server maker issued a fourth-quarter revenue forecast that exceeded Wall Street expectations, supported by continued strong demand for AI-focused data center infrastructure. By 04:12 ET, shares in the company had rallied sharply following the release of its latest quarterly results and outlook.

headline: Super Micro Rockets 18% on Earnings Beat, $12.5 Billion Q4 Guide, Nuclear-Powered AI Vision
